MILĀ PULSE · WEEKLY POINTS
This
Week
Jul 6 – Jul 12, 2026 · Issue 3F
Focus: Guest Satisfaction & Reviews
01FOCUS
✎ Editorial · manager-written
This week our main focus is guest satisfaction and reviews. Be intentional about creating memorable experiences, strengthen every guest interaction, and confidently offer review cards to guests who are having a great time. Stay present, read your tables, and elevate the experience from the first greeting to the final goodbye.
4.8
★★★★★
20,319 Google reviews
Tonight’s goal: deliver excellence so consistently that guests feel compelled to leave a review. Take control of the table, anticipate needs, and end with a strong farewell. Reviews are earned through details.
02CORE VALUE
“
Passion is the energy that pushes us to go further, work harder, and bring our best to everything we do.
03 · 04KNOWLEDGE & SOP
SERVICE KNOWLEDGE
Seating & Menu Presentation

Seating should be smooth, efficient, and elegant. Presenting the menu is the first opportunity to guide guests through their culinary experience.

GENERAL KNOWLEDGE
Other RDG Venues

Know the family — when a night is full or a guest is traveling, recommend a sister venue.

ClaudieCasa NeosAVA MediterrAegean
ZERO TOLERANCE
Food & Beverage Conduct

Eating, drinking, or taking food in unauthorized areas or without approval is strictly prohibited.

✎ Manager poster · tap to zoom
SERVICE SOP · EFFECTIVE IMMEDIATELY
Ice Service

MILĀ standard: GOLD insulated ice cup and GOLD ice tongs (shared with Casa Neos; AVA Winter Park, AVA Coconut Grove and Claudie use silver). The approved vessel and tongs must always match the venue — no substitutions.

THE FIVE STEPS
1 · PresentPresent the insulated ice cup from the right side of the table — “May I refresh your ice?”
2 · TongsUse only the approved ice tongs for your venue. Never hands, scoops, spoons, or any other utensil.
3 · RefreshPick up ice and deliver gently into the guest’s glass. Fill to appropriate level — clean, clear, free of chips or broken pieces.
4 · MaintainKeep the ice cup full and available throughout the meal; replace with a fresh cup if needed.
5 · ThankThank the guest and place the ice cup back on the table or station within easy reach.

Consistent use of the correct cup and tongs is non-negotiable — it’s part of overall service standards, addressed in training, evaluations, and guest-experience audits. Wash after each shift with warm soapy water, rinse and dry before returning to service, inspect daily.

05BAR
✎ Manager poster · tap to zoom
SPIRIT KNOWLEDGE
Japanese Whiskey

Harmony in nature, crafted with precision — known for its balance, purity, and subtle complexity. Inspired by nature and refined through tradition; each bottle tells a story of craftsmanship and deep respect for time.

OUR SELECTION · WITH TASTING NOTES
Hibiki HarmonyMasterful blend of malt and grain whiskies; elegant and harmonious — honey, orange peel, white floral
Yamazaki 12Japan’s most iconic single malt; rich, refined, layered with depth — ripe fruit, vanilla, mizunara oak
Hakushu 12Fresh and vibrant single malt; a beautiful balance of nature and smoke — green apple, mint, smoke
TaketsuruPure malt blend from Yoichi and Miyagikyo; smooth, balanced, mellow — nuts, caramel, cocoa
YoichiBold and smoky single malt from Hokkaido; masculine and full-bodied — smoke, sea salt, dried fruit
Takamime 8Refined blend with sherry-cask influence; smooth and approachable — dried apricot, honey, spice
Kaiyo SeasideAged near the ocean in Wakayama; mellow, salty, uniquely coastal — sea breeze, vanilla, citrus
PERFECT PAIRINGS
OysterThe briny ocean meets smooth depth — Hakushu 12, Yoichi, Kaiyo
SashimiClean, delicate flavors enhanced by subtle complexity — Hibiki Harmony, Taketsuru, Kaiyo
WagyuUmami and richness come alive with depth and nuance — Yamazaki 12, Takamime, Yoichi
WAYS TO UPSELL
Suntory Premium Highball (soda & citrus)Add a premium iceTaste the collection · 3 × 15 mlPair with oyster, sashimi or wagyu
06WINE
✎ Manager poster · tap to zoom
✓ Pulled from your verified menu
🍯Château Suduiraut Sauternes ’13Bordeaux · Sémillon 90 / SB 10 · apricot, honey, white peach · lush & balanced$403 oz
👑Château d’Yquem Sauternes ’16The benchmark · Sémillon 80 / SB 20 · pineapple, mango, honeycomb, vanilla, saffron$601 oz
🍇Florio Marsala Semisecco Riserva ’15Sicily · Grillo, Inzolia, Catarratto · dried fig, caramel, toasted almond · “solera” aged$203 oz
🥃Taylor Fladgate 20 Yr Tawny Porto NVDouro · traditional blend · dried fig, prune, caramel, hazelnut, mocha · nutty nightcap$253 oz
SERVICE TIPS

Serve Sauternes & Marsala slightly chilled (45–50°F) · Porto slightly cooler than room temperature (55–60°F) · all pours are 3 oz, designed for savoring (d’Yquem 1 oz) · these wines offer depth, balance and a memorable end to any dining experience — pour with intention, present with pride.

Ask anything
Menu & Catalogs
Learn & Knowledge
Zapheria Ask
Grounded in MILA's verified menu
Hi Dani 👋 Ask me anything about the menu, allergens, pairings, or service. I only answer from MILA's verified data.
Is the Hamachi Crudo safe for a tree-nut allergy?
The Hamachi Crudo contains no tree nuts in its listed components (coconut avocado coulis, cilantro oil). However, it's prepared in a shared station — confirm with the kitchen for severe allergies.
Source: Food menu · verified
What wine pairs with it?
A crisp, mineral white works best — the Sancerre (Loire) on the by-the-glass list complements the yuzu and avocado without overpowering the fish.
Source: Wine list · pairings
What's in a Jade Reverie?
A tropical tall drink — pandan-infused Bacardi 8 rum and E11even vodka, with pistachio-pandan orgeat, falernum, pandan liqueur, pineapple and lime, finished with a mist of Palo Santo. Heads up — it flags Nuts, Citrus and Gluten.
Source: Beverages · verified
Example questions
Live questions are coming. Ask will answer only from MILA's verified core — never invented.
